verses.text: Tua ciangin Jerubbaal (Gideon a cihna) leh amah tawh a om mi khempeuh zingsangin tho baihin Harod tuikhuk gei-ah giahphual a sat uh hi. Midian-te' giahphual pen amau' kiang pan leilu lam, Moreh mual kiang, kuam sungah om hi

Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Amau' khutsungah Midian mite piakna dingin nang tawh a omkhawm mite kei-a' dingin tamlua hi. Tua bangin tamlua leh kei tungah Israel-te kisialin, ‘Komau' hatna hangin ka gualzo uh hi,’ ci khading uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in mite' zakin taangko in la, ‘Lau-in a ling mi peuhmah a inn-ah ciah un,’ ci in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Gideon in amaute ze-et hi; tul sawmnih leh tul nih ciahkikin, tul sawm bang bek omlai hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Mite tamlua lai ahih manin tui gei-ah amaute paipih in. Nang-a' dingin tua munah amaute kong sinsak ding hi. Nang kiangah, ‘Hih mipa nang tawh hong kuan ding hi,’ ka cihpa nang tawh hong kuan ding hi. Nang kiangah, ‘Hih mipa nang tawh hong kuanlo ding hi,’ ka cih peuhpeuhpa kuanlo ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah in tui phualah mite paipih suk hi. Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Ui in a liah bangin a lei tawh tui a liak mi peuhmah na tuamkoih ding hi. Tua mah bangin tui dawn dingin a khukdin' suk peuhmah zong na tuamkoih ding hi,” a ci hi
Tui a liak, a khut uh a kamah a tuah mi za thum ahi hi. Ahih hangin a dangte khempeuh tui dawn dingin khukdin' suk uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Gideon kiangah, “Tui a liak mi za thumte tawh nangmah hong honkhia-in, na khutsungah Midian mite kong pia ding hi. A dangte khempeuh amau' inn ciatah ciahsak in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in Israel midang khempeuh ciahsak a, a beelte leh a peengkulte khempeuh uh a kem mihing za thumte a khawlsak hi. Midian-te' giahphual pen amau' khanglam kuam sungah om hi
Tua zan mahin Topa in ama kiangah, “Tho in, giahphual simin pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh na khutsungah kong piazo hi
Ahih hangin na simsuk ngam kei leh, na nasempa Purah tawh a giahphual nai uhah paisuk in

Tua ciangin amaute' thugen na za ding a, giahphual simin a kuansuk dingin na tha hong khauh ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin a nasempa Purah tawh giahphuala om galkapte in a pualamah a galpan'na munah a paisuk uh hi
Midian mite, Amalek mite, leh Nisuahna lam mite khempeuh kauphe bangin tamin kuam dungah om uh hi. A kalaohte uh simzawh hilo a, a tamna pen tuipi gei-a sehnel omzah bang ahi hi

Gideon a tun' ciangin, mi khat in a lawmpa kiangah mang khat na gen hi. Amah in, “Ngai in, mang khat ka man hi. Midian-te giahphual sungah mangbuhham tawh a kibawl moh khat hong tuksukin puanbuk hong ban a, puanbuk deng kha-in puanbuk puk a, puanbuk kilumletin leilakah kiphah hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a lawmpa in dawngin, “Hih pen, Israel mi Joash' tapa Gideon' namsau lo adang hilo hi. Pasian in ama khutsungah Midian leh mihon khempeuh pia khin hi,” a ci hi

Gideon in a mang leh a khiatna a kigenna a zak ciangin Pasian bia-in a khukdin' hi. Israel-te' giahphualah ciahkikin, “Tho un, bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na khutsung uhah Midian honte hong piazo hi,” a ci hi
Amah in mihing za thumte pawl thumin khenin, amaute khempeuh tungah peengkul leh beel sungah meilah a om beel hawmte a pia hi
Amaute kiangah, “Keimah hong en un la, a giahphual nawl ka tun' ciangin kei' hih bangin hih un
Kei leh ka ompih khempeuh in peengkul ka tum uh ciangin, giahphual pang khempeuhah zong peengkulte tum un la, ‘ Topa-a' ding leh Gideon-a' ding,’ ci-in awng un,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin, amaute in galvil a laih khit phet, zankim laitakin, Gideon leh amah tawh a om mi za khatte giahphual nawlah hong pai uh a, amaute in peengkul tumin a khutsung uha om beelte a sukham uh hi

A pawl thum-un peengkul tumin beelte sukham uh a, a veilam khutun meilah tawi-in, a taklam khutun a tum ding uh peengkul tawi uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute kiko-in, “ Topa-a' ding leh Gideon-a' ding namsau khat!” a ci uh hi
Amaute a vekpi-in giahphual kiimah ding uh a, a galte khempeuh uh kiko-in taikhia uh hi

Amaute in peengkul za thumte a tum uh ciangin, Topa in a galte khempeuh a namsau uh tawh amau leh amau kisatgawp sak hi. Tua ciangin a galte uh Zererah gei Bethshittah ciang, leh Tabbath kiang Abelmeholah gamgi dong tai uh hi
Tua ciangin Naftali, Asher, leh Manasseh minamte khempeuh sung panin mite kisamkhia a, amaute in Midian-te a delh uh hi

Tua ciangin Gideon in Efraim mualtung gam khempeuhah kamtaite sawl a, “Midian mite' langkhatah hong kuansukin Bethbarah ciangdong luite hong la un la, Jordan zong hong la un,” cisak hi. Tua ahih ciangin Efraim mite khempeuh kisamkhia a, amaute in Bethbarah ciangdong luite la-in, Jordan zong a la uh hi

Amaute in Midian ulian nihte Oreb leh Zeeb a man uh hi. Amaute in Midian-te a delh kawmun Oreb Suangpi-ah Oreb that uh a, Zeeb Leenggahsukna-ah Zeeb that uh hi. Amaute in Jordan galkhat Gideon kiangah Oreb leh Zeeb lutangte hong paipih uh hi.
